creator: krion@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #41)
I don't want to add CMake as a dependency. The current autotools setup has proven reliable over years of use. While CMake might offer some benefits, it also comes with its own overhead in terms of build and compilation time. I prefer to stick with the current solution that works well rather than introduce a new build system dependency without a compelling need to do so.
